transformations.name: silver_to_gold_gold_attack_surface_index_per_asset

steps.sql_logic:
INSERT INTO gold_attack_surface_index_per_asset (asset_id, attack_surface_index)
SELECT 
    a.asset_id,
    COALESCE(SUM(asi.value), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(ass.id), 0) AS attack_surface_index
FROM 
    assets_table a
LEFT JOIN 
    assessments_table ass ON a.asset_id = ass.asset_id
LEFT JOIN 
    attack_surface_index_table asi ON ass.id = asi.assessment_id
WHERE 
    ass.timestamp = (SELECT MAX(timestamp) FROM assessments_table WHERE asset_id = a.asset_id)
GROUP BY 
    a.asset_id;
steps.description: The Attack Surface Index (ASI) calculated for each asset.

transformations.sql:
-- Metric: attack_surface_index_per_asset: The Attack Surface Index (ASI) calculated for each asset.
INSERT INTO gold_attack_surface_index_per_asset (asset_id, attack_surface_index)
SELECT 
    a.asset_id,
    COALESCE(SUM(asi.value), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(ass.id), 0) AS attack_surface_index
FROM 
    assets_table a
LEFT JOIN 
    assessments_table ass ON a.asset_id = ass.asset_id
LEFT JOIN 
    attack_surface_index_table asi ON ass.id = asi.assessment_id
WHERE 
    ass.timestamp = (SELECT MAX(timestamp) FROM assessments_table WHERE asset_id = a.asset_id)
GROUP BY 
    a.asset_id;
transformations.description: Transform gold_attack_surface_index_per_asset from silver to gold

transformations.name: silver_to_gold_gold_distribution_of_attack_surface_index

steps.sql_logic:
INSERT INTO gold_distribution_of_attack_surface_index (attack_surface_index, asset_count)
SELECT 
    attack_surface_index,
    COUNT(*) AS asset_count
FROM 
    assets_table
WHERE 
    attack_surface_index IS NOT NULL  -- Ensure only valid ASI values are considered
GROUP BY 
    attack_surface_index
ORDER BY 
    attack_surface_index;  -- Optional: Order by ASI for better readability
steps.description: The distribution of Attack Surface Index values across all assets.

transformations.sql:
-- Metric: distribution_of_attack_surface_index: The distribution of Attack Surface Index values across all assets.
INSERT INTO gold_distribution_of_attack_surface_index (attack_surface_index, asset_count)
SELECT 
    attack_surface_index,
    COUNT(*) AS asset_count
FROM 
    assets_table
WHERE 
    attack_surface_index IS NOT NULL  -- Ensure only valid ASI values are considered
GROUP BY 
    attack_surface_index
ORDER BY 
    attack_surface_index;  -- Optional: Order by ASI for better readability
transformations.description: Transform gold_distribution_of_attack_surface_index from silver to gold

transformations.name: silver_to_gold_gold_top_10_highest_risk_assets

steps.sql_logic:
INSERT INTO gold_top_10_highest_risk_assets (asset_id, asi_value)
SELECT asset_id, asi_value
FROM assets_table
WHERE asi_value IS NOT NULL  -- Ensure ASI is valid
ORDER BY asi_value DESC  -- Sort by ASI in descending order
LIMIT 10;  -- Select top 10 assets
steps.description: The top 10 assets with the highest Attack Surface Index values.

SELECT asset_id, asi_value
FROM assets_table
WHERE asi_value IS NOT NULL  -- Ensure ASI is valid
ORDER BY asi_value DESC  -- Sort by ASI in descending order
LIMIT 10;  -- Select top 10 assets

transformations.name: silver_to_gold_gold_total_external_exposure_score

steps.sql_logic:
INSERT INTO gold_total_external_exposure_score (environment, total_external_exposure_score)
SELECT 
    environment,
    COALESCE(SUM(external_exposure_score), 0) AS total_external_exposure_score
FROM 
    assets_table
GROUP BY 
    environment;
steps.description: The total score representing external exposure across all assets.

    environment,
    COALESCE(SUM(external_exposure_score), 0) AS total_external_exposure_score
FROM

GROUP BY 
    environment;

transformations.name: silver_to_gold_gold_external_exposure_score_by_environment

steps.sql_logic:
INSERT INTO gold_external_exposure_score_by_environment (environment, total_external_exposure_score)
SELECT 
    COALESCE(environment, 'Unknown') AS environment,  -- Handle NULL environments
    SUM(external_exposure_score) AS total_external_exposure_score
FROM 
    assets_table
WHERE 
    environment IS NOT NULL  -- Only consider assets with an assigned environment
GROUP BY 
    environment
ORDER BY 
    environment;  -- Optional: Order by environment for better readability
steps.description: The breakdown of total external exposure score by environment (prod vs non-prod).

transformations.sql:

    COALESCE(environment, 'Unknown') AS environment,  -- Handle NULL environments
    SUM(external_exposure_score) AS total_external_exposure_score
FROM 
    assets_table
WHERE 
    environment IS NOT NULL  -- Only consider assets with an assigned environment
GROUP BY 
    environment
ORDER BY 
    environment;  -- Optional: Order by environment for better readability

transformations.name: silver_to_gold_gold_vulnerability_exposure_score

steps.sql_logic:
INSERT INTO gold_vulnerability_exposure_score (asset_id, vulnerability_exposure_score)
SELECT 
    asset_id,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(CVSS, 0), 0) * 
    COALESCE(NULLIF(EPSS, 0), 0) * 
    COALESCE(NULLIF(KEV_flag, 0), 0) * 
    COALESCE(NULLIF(internet_facing_flag, 0), 0) AS vulnerability_exposure_score
FROM 
    assets_table
WHERE 
    CVSS IS NOT NULL AND 
    EPSS IS NOT NULL AND 
    KEV_flag IS NOT NULL AND 
    internet_facing_flag IS NOT NULL;
steps.description: The calculated vulnerability exposure score for each asset based on CVSS, EPSS, KEV flag, and internet-facing flag.

transformations.sql:
-- Metric: vulnerability_exposure_score: The calculated vulnerability exposure score for each asset based on CVSS, EPSS, KEV flag, and internet-facing flag.
INSERT INTO gold_vulnerability_exposure_score (asset_id, vulnerability_exposure_score)
SELECT 
    asset_id,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(CVSS, 0), 0) * 
    COALESCE(NULLIF(EPSS, 0), 0) * 
    COALESCE(NULLIF(KEV_flag, 0), 0) * 
    COALESCE(NULLIF(internet_facing_flag, 0), 0) AS vulnerability_exposure_score
FROM 
    assets_table
WHERE 
    CVSS IS NOT NULL AND 
    EPSS IS NOT NULL AND 
    KEV_flag IS NOT NULL AND 
    internet_facing_flag IS NOT NULL;
transformations.description: Transform gold_vulnerability_exposure_score from silver to gold

transformations.name: silver_to_gold_gold_misconfiguration_exposure_score

steps.sql_logic:
SELECT 
    "severity_category",
    DATE_TRUNC('month', "created_at") AS "month",
    COALESCE(SUM("exposure_score"), 0) AS "total_exposure_score"
FROM 
    "misconfiguration_scores"
GROUP BY 
    "severity_category", 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', "created_at")
ORDER BY 
    "month" DESC, 
    "severity_category";
steps.description: The total misconfiguration exposure score calculated based on severity categories.

transformations.sql:
-- Metric: misconfiguration_exposure_score: The total misconfiguration exposure score calculated based on severity categories.
SELECT 
    "severity_category",
    DATE_TRUNC('month', "created_at") AS "month",
    COALESCE(SUM("exposure_score"), 0) AS "total_exposure_score"
FROM 
    "misconfiguration_scores"
GROUP BY 
    "severity_category", 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', "created_at")
ORDER BY 
    "month" DESC, 
    "severity_category";
transformations.description: Transform gold_misconfiguration_exposure_score from silver to gold

transformations.name: silver_to_gold_gold_misconfiguration_exposure_score_trend

steps.sql_logic:
INSERT INTO gold_misconfiguration_exposure_score_trend (month, severity_category, total_exposure_score)
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', ms.timestamp) AS month,  -- Truncate timestamp to month
    ms.severity_category,  -- Group by severity category
    SUM(COALESCE(ms.exposure_score, 0)) AS total_exposure_score  -- Sum exposure scores, handling NULLs
FROM 
    misconfiguration_scores ms
WHERE 
    ms.timestamp >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '6 months'  -- Filter for the last 6 months
GROUP BY 
    month, severity_category  -- Group by month and severity category
ORDER BY 
    month, severity_category;  -- Order results for better readability
steps.description: The trend of misconfiguration exposure scores over the last 6 months.

transformations.sql:
-- Metric: misconfiguration_exposure_score_trend: The trend of misconfiguration exposure scores over the last 6 months.
INSERT INTO gold_misconfiguration_exposure_score_trend (month, severity_category, total_exposure_score)
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', ms.timestamp) AS month,  -- Truncate timestamp to month
    ms.severity_category,  -- Group by severity category
    SUM(COALESCE(ms.exposure_score, 0)) AS total_exposure_score  -- Sum exposure scores, handling NULLs
FROM 
    misconfiguration_scores ms
WHERE 
    ms.timestamp >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '6 months'  -- Filter for the last 6 months
GROUP BY 
    month, severity_category  -- Group by month and severity category
ORDER BY 
    month, severity_category;  -- Order results for better readability
transformations.description: Transform gold_misconfiguration_exposure_score_trend from silver to gold

transformations.name: silver_to_gold_gold_identity_exposure_score_per_asset

steps.sql_logic:
INSERT INTO gold_identity_exposure_score_per_asset (asset_id, exposure_score)
SELECT 
    a.asset_id,
    COALESCE(SUM(
        CASE 
            WHEN aa.admin_account_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 
            ELSE 0 
        END +
        CASE 
            WHEN sa.stale_account_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 
            ELSE 0 
        END +
        CASE 
            WHEN mfa.mfa_enabled = TRUE THEN 1 
            ELSE 0 
        END
    ), 0) AS identity_exposure_score
FROM 
    assets a
LEFT JOIN 
    admin_accounts aa ON a.asset_id = aa.asset_id
LEFT JOIN 
    stale_accounts sa ON a.asset_id = sa.asset_id
LEFT JOIN 
    mfa_status mfa ON a.asset_id = mfa.asset_id
GROUP BY 
    a.asset_id;
steps.description: The calculated identity exposure score for each asset based on the status of admin accounts, stale accounts, and MFA.

transformations.sql:
-- Metric: identity_exposure_score_per_asset: The calculated identity exposure score for each asset based on the status of admin accounts, stale accounts, and MFA.
INSERT INTO gold_identity_exposure_score_per_asset (asset_id, exposure_score)
SELECT 
    a.asset_id,
    COALESCE(SUM(
        CASE 
            WHEN aa.admin_account_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 
            ELSE 0 
        END +
        CASE 
            WHEN sa.stale_account_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 
            ELSE 0 
        END +
        CASE 
            WHEN mfa.mfa_enabled = TRUE THEN 1 
            ELSE 0 
        END
    ), 0) AS identity_exposure_score
FROM 
    assets a
LEFT JOIN 
    admin_accounts aa ON a.asset_id = aa.asset_id
LEFT JOIN 
    stale_accounts sa ON a.asset_id = sa.asset_id
LEFT JOIN 
    mfa_status mfa ON a.asset_id = mfa.asset_id
GROUP BY 
    a.asset_id;
transformations.description: Transform gold_identity_exposure_score_per_asset from silver to gold

transformations.name: silver_to_gold_gold_admin_account_count

steps.sql_logic:
INSERT INTO gold_admin_account_count (asset_id, admin_account_count)
SELECT 
    asset_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT id) AS admin_account_count  -- Count of distinct active admin accounts
FROM 
    admin_accounts
WHERE 
    status = 'active'  -- Only consider active admin accounts
GROUP BY 
    asset_id;  -- Group by asset_id to get counts per asset
steps.description: Count of admin accounts associated with each asset.

FROM 
    admin_accounts
WHERE 
    status = 'active'  -- Only consider active admin accounts

    asset_id;  -- Group by asset_id to get counts per asset

transformations.name: silver_to_gold_gold_mfa_status_percentage

steps.sql_logic:
INSERT INTO gold_mfa_status_percentage (asset_id, mfa_enabled_percentage)
SELECT 
    asset_id,
    COALESCE(
        (COUNT(CASE WHEN mfa_configured THEN 1 END) * 100.0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 
        0) AS mfa_enabled_percentage
FROM 
    mfa_status
GROUP BY 
    asset_id;
steps.description: Percentage of assets that have Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) enabled.

transformations.sql:
-- Metric: mfa_status_percentage: Percentage of assets that have Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) enabled.
INSERT INTO gold_mfa_status_percentage (asset_id, mfa_enabled_percentage)
SELECT 
    asset_id,
    COALESCE(
        (COUNT(CASE WHEN mfa_configured THEN 1 END) * 100.0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 
        0) AS mfa_enabled_percentage
FROM 
    mfa_status
GROUP BY 
    asset_id;
transformations.description: Transform gold_mfa_status_percentage from silver to gold

transformations.name: silver_to_gold_gold_software_exposure_score_per_asset

steps.sql_logic:
WITH latest_software AS (
    SELECT 
        s."asset_id",
        MAX(s."exposure_score") AS "latest_exposure_score"
    FROM 
        software_table s
    WHERE 
        s."status" IN ('EOL', 'unsupported')  -- Filter for EOL or unsupported software
    GROUP BY 
        s."asset_id"
),
asset_exposure AS (
    SELECT 
        a."business_unit",
        COALESCE(SUM(ls."latest_exposure_score"), 0) AS "total_exposure_score"
    FROM 
        assets_table a
    LEFT JOIN 
        latest_software ls ON a."id" = ls."asset_id"
    WHERE 
        ls."latest_exposure_score" IS NOT NULL  -- Only include assets with exposure scores
    GROUP BY 
        a."business_unit"
)
SELECT 
    "business_unit",
    COALESCE(AVG("total_exposure_score"), 0) AS "average_exposure_score"
FROM 
    asset_exposure
GROUP BY 
    "business_unit";
steps.description: The average exposure score of software per asset based on EOL and unsupported software.

transformations.sql:
-- Metric: software_exposure_score_per_asset: The average exposure score of software per asset based on EOL and unsupported software.
WITH latest_software AS (
    SELECT 
        s."asset_id",
        MAX(s."exposure_score") AS "latest_exposure_score"
    FROM 
        software_table s
    WHERE 
        s."status" IN ('EOL', 'unsupported')  -- Filter for EOL or unsupported software
    GROUP BY 
        s."asset_id"
),
asset_exposure AS (
    SELECT 
        a."business_unit",
        COALESCE(SUM(ls."latest_exposure_score"), 0) AS "total_exposure_score"
    FROM 
        assets_table a
    LEFT JOIN 
        latest_software ls ON a."id" = ls."asset_id"
    WHERE 
        ls."latest_exposure_score" IS NOT NULL  -- Only include assets with exposure scores
    GROUP BY 
        a."business_unit"
)
SELECT 
    "business_unit",
    COALESCE(AVG("total_exposure_score"), 0) AS "average_exposure_score"
FROM 
    asset_exposure
GROUP BY 
    "business_unit";
transformations.description: Transform gold_software_exposure_score_per_asset from silver to gold

transformations.name: silver_to_gold_gold_count_of_assets_with_eol_or_unsupported_software

steps.sql_logic:
INSERT INTO gold_count_of_assets_with_eol_or_unsupported_software (business_unit, asset_count)
SELECT 
    a.business_unit,
    COUNT(DISTINCT a.asset_id) AS asset_count
FROM 
    assets_table a
JOIN 
    software_table s ON a.software_id = s.software_id
WHERE 
    COALESCE(s.eol, FALSE) = TRUE OR COALESCE(s.unsupported, FALSE) = TRUE
GROUP BY 
    a.business_unit;
steps.description: The count of assets that have EOL or unsupported software.

transformations.sql:
-- Metric: count_of_assets_with_eol_or_unsupported_software: The count of assets that have EOL or unsupported software.
INSERT INTO gold_count_of_assets_with_eol_or_unsupported_software (business_unit, asset_count)
SELECT 
    a.business_unit,
    COUNT(DISTINCT a.asset_id) AS asset_count
FROM 
    assets_table a
JOIN 
    software_table s ON a.software_id = s.software_id
WHERE 
    COALESCE(s.eol, FALSE) = TRUE OR COALESCE(s.unsupported, FALSE) = TRUE
GROUP BY 
    a.business_unit;

transformations.name: silver_to_gold_gold_exploitability_trend_over_12_months

steps.sql_logic:
INSERT INTO gold_exploitability_trend_over_12_months (asset_id, month, average_exploitability_score)
SELECT 
    asset_id,
    DATE_TRUNC('month', exploitability_date) AS month,
    AVG(COALESCE(exploitability_score, 0)) AS average_exploitability_score
FROM 
    assets_table
WHERE 
    exploitability_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '12 months'
GROUP BY 
    asset_id, month
ORDER BY 
    asset_id, month;
steps.description: The trend of exploitability likelihood scores for assets over the past 12 months.

transformations.sql:
-- Metric: exploitability_trend_over_12_months: The trend of exploitability likelihood scores for assets over the past 12 months.

SELECT 
    asset_id,
    DATE_TRUNC('month', exploitability_date) AS month,
    AVG(COALESCE(exploitability_score, 0)) AS average_exploitability_score
FROM 
    assets_table
WHERE 
    exploitability_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '12 months'
GROUP BY 
    asset_id, month
ORDER BY 
    asset_id, month;
transformations.description: Transform gold_exploitability_trend_over_12_months from silver to gold

transformations.name: silver_to_gold_gold_increasing_risk_assets

steps.sql_logic:
INSERT INTO gold_increasing_risk_assets (asset_id, current_month_score, previous_month_score, score_increase)
WITH monthly_scores AS (
    SELECT 
        asset_id,
        DATE_TRUNC('month', score_date) AS month,
        AVG(exploitability_likelihood) AS avg_score
    FROM 
        assets_table
    WHERE 
        score_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '12 months'
    GROUP BY 
        asset_id, DATE_TRUNC('month', score_date)
),
score_comparison AS (
    SELECT 
        current.asset_id,
        current.avg_score AS current_month_score,
        previous.avg_score AS previous_month_score
    FROM 
        monthly_scores AS current
    LEFT JOIN 
        monthly_scores AS previous 
    ON 
        current.asset_id = previous.asset_id 
        AND current.month = previous.month + INTERVAL '1 month'
)
SELECT 
    asset_id,
    current_month_score,
    previous_month_score,
    CASE 
        WHEN current_month_score > COALESCE(previous_month_score, 0) THEN TRUE 
        ELSE FALSE 
    END AS score_increase
FROM 
    score_comparison
WHERE 
    current_month_score > COALESCE(previous_month_score, 0);
steps.description: Assets that have shown an increase in exploitability likelihood over the last 12 months.

transformations.sql:
-- Metric: increasing_risk_assets: Assets that have shown an increase in exploitability likelihood over the last 12 months.
INSERT INTO gold_increasing_risk_assets (asset_id, current_month_score, previous_month_score, score_increase)
WITH monthly_scores AS (
    SELECT 
        asset_id,
        DATE_TRUNC('month', score_date) AS month,
        AVG(exploitability_likelihood) AS avg_score
    FROM 
        assets_table
    WHERE 
        score_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '12 months'
    GROUP BY 
        asset_id, DATE_TRUNC('month', score_date)
),
score_comparison AS (
    SELECT 
        current.asset_id,
        current.avg_score AS current_month_score,
        previous.avg_score AS previous_month_score
    FROM 
        monthly_scores AS current
    LEFT JOIN 
        monthly_scores AS previous 
    ON 
        current.asset_id = previous.asset_id 
        AND current.month = previous.month + INTERVAL '1 month'
)
SELECT 
    asset_id,
    current_month_score,
    previous_month_score,
    CASE 
        WHEN current_month_score > COALESCE(previous_month_score, 0) THEN TRUE 
        ELSE FALSE 
    END AS score_increase
FROM 
    score_comparison
WHERE 
    current_month_score > COALESCE(previous_month_score, 0);
transformations.description: Transform gold_increasing_risk_assets from silver to gold

transformations.name: silver_to_gold_gold_attack_surface_index

steps.sql_logic:
INSERT INTO gold_attack_surface_index (asset, asi)
SELECT 
    asset,
    SUM(weight * COALESCE(component_value, 0)) AS asi
FROM 
    silver_attack_surface_components
GROUP BY 
    asset;
steps.description: The composite Attack Surface Index (ASI) calculated using weighted components.

transformations.name: silver_to_gold_gold_weighted_component_value

steps.sql_logic:
INSERT INTO gold_weighted_component_value (asset, component, weighted_value)
SELECT 
    asset,
    component,
    SUM(COALESCE(value, 0) * COALESCE(weight, 0)) AS weighted_value
FROM (
    SELECT 
        asset,
        component,
        value,
        weight,
        SUM(weight) OVER (PARTITION BY asset) AS total_weight
    FROM 
        silver_attack_surface_components
) AS subquery
WHERE 
    total_weight > 0  -- Ensure weights are normalized
GROUP BY 
    asset, component;
steps.description: The value of each component weighted according to its importance.

        value,
        weight,

    FROM

) AS subquery
WHERE 
    total_weight > 0  -- Ensure weights are normalized
GROUP BY

transformations.name: silver_to_gold_gold_total_attack_surface_contribution

steps.sql_logic:
INSERT INTO gold_total_attack_surface_contribution (os_stack, software_stack, total_contribution)
SELECT 
    COALESCE(s.os_stack, 'Unknown') AS os_stack,  -- Handle NULL OS stack
    COALESCE(s.software_stack, 'Unknown') AS software_stack,  -- Handle NULL software stack
    SUM(COALESCE(s.contribution, 0)) AS total_contribution  -- Sum contributions, treating NULL as 0
FROM 
    silver_attack_surface s
JOIN 
    gold_attack_surface g ON s.id = g.id  -- Assuming a common identifier for joining
GROUP BY 
    s.os_stack, s.software_stack  -- Group by OS and software stack
HAVING 
    SUM(COALESCE(s.contribution, 0)) > 0;  -- Only include groups with positive contributions
steps.description: Total contribution to the attack surface by the OS/software stack.

transformations.name: silver_to_gold_gold_overall_risk_by_stack

steps.sql_logic:
INSERT INTO gold_overall_risk_by_stack (os_stack, software_stack, total_risk_score)
SELECT 
    COALESCE(sra.os_stack, 'Unknown OS') AS os_stack,  -- Handle NULL OS stack
    COALESCE(sra.software_stack, 'Unknown Software') AS software_stack,  -- Handle NULL software stack
    SUM(COALESCE(gra.risk_score, 0)) AS total_risk_score  -- Sum risk scores, treating NULL as 0
FROM 
    silver_risk_assessment sra
LEFT JOIN 
    gold_risk_assessment gra ON sra.id = gra.assessment_id  -- Assuming a join condition based on assessment ID
GROUP BY 
    sra.os_stack, 
    sra.software_stack
ORDER BY 
    os_stack, 
    software_stack;  -- Order by OS and software stack for better readability

transformations.name: silver_to_gold_gold_percentage_contribution_to_risk

steps.sql_logic:
INSERT INTO gold_percentage_contribution_to_risk (os_stack, software_stack, percentage_contribution)
WITH risk_data AS (
    SELECT 
        s.os_stack,
        s.software_stack,
        SUM(COALESCE(r.risk_score, 0)) AS total_risk_contribution
    FROM 
        silver_attack_surface s
    JOIN 
        silver_risk_assessment r ON s.id = r.attack_surface_id
    GROUP BY 
        s.os_stack, s.software_stack
),
overall_risk AS (
    SELECT 
        SUM(total_risk_contribution) AS total_overall_risk
    FROM 
        risk_data
)
SELECT 
    rd.os_stack,
    rd.software_stack,
    CASE 
        WHEN o.total_overall_risk IS NULL OR o.total_overall_risk = 0 THEN 0
        ELSE (rd.total_risk_contribution / NULLIF(o.total_overall_risk, 0)) * 100
    END AS percentage_contribution
FROM 
    risk_data rd,
    overall_risk o;
steps.description: Percentage contribution of each OS/software stack to the overall risk.

transformations.sql:
-- Metric: percentage_contribution_to_risk: Percentage contribution of each OS/software stack to the overall risk.
INSERT INTO gold_percentage_contribution_to_risk (os_stack, software_stack, percentage_contribution)
WITH risk_data AS (
    SELECT 
        s.os_stack,
        s.software_stack,
        SUM(COALESCE(r.risk_score, 0)) AS total_risk_contribution
    FROM 
        silver_attack_surface s
    JOIN 
        silver_risk_assessment r ON s.id = r.attack_surface_id
    GROUP BY 
        s.os_stack, s.software_stack
),
overall_risk AS (
    SELECT 
        SUM(total_risk_contribution) AS total_overall_risk
    FROM 
        risk_data
)
SELECT 
    rd.os_stack,
    rd.software_stack,
    CASE 
        WHEN o.total_overall_risk IS NULL OR o.total_overall_risk = 0 THEN 0
        ELSE (rd.total_risk_contribution / NULLIF(o.total_overall_risk, 0)) * 100
    END AS percentage_contribution
FROM 
    risk_data rd,
    overall_risk o;

transformations.name: silver_to_gold_gold_top_contributing_stacks

steps.sql_logic:
INSERT INTO gold_top_contributing_stacks (os_stack, software_stack, total_risk_score)
WITH risk_contributions AS (
    SELECT 
        s.os_stack,
        s.software_stack,
        SUM(COALESCE(gra.risk_score, 0)) AS total_risk_score
    FROM 
        silver_attack_surface s
    JOIN 
        gold_attack_surface ga ON s.id = ga.attack_surface_id
    JOIN 
        silver_risk_assessment sra ON ga.id = sra.attack_surface_id
    JOIN 
        gold_risk_assessment gra ON sra.id = gra.risk_assessment_id
    GROUP BY 
        s.os_stack, s.software_stack
)
SELECT 
    os_stack,
    software_stack,
    total_risk_score
FROM 
    risk_contributions
ORDER BY 
    total_risk_score DESC
LIMIT 10;
steps.description: Identify the top OS/software stacks contributing to the overall risk.

transformations.name: silver_to_gold_gold_exposure_score_weekly_average

steps.sql_logic:
INSERT INTO gold_exposure_score_weekly_average (week_start, average_exposure_score)
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('week', es."timestamp") AS week_start,  -- Truncate timestamp to week
    COALESCE(SUM(es.exposure_score), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(es.exposure_score), 0) AS average_exposure_score  -- Calculate average, handle division by zero
FROM 
    exposure_scores es
WHERE 
    es.exposure_score IS NOT NULL  -- Only include records with valid exposure scores
GROUP BY 
    week_start
ORDER BY 
    week_start;  -- Order by week for clarity
steps.description: Average exposure score calculated on a weekly basis.

FROM

WHERE

GROUP BY

ORDER BY

transformations.name: silver_to_gold_gold_exposure_score_week_over_week_change

steps.sql_logic:
INSERT INTO gold_exposure_score_week_over_week_change (week_start_date, percentage_change)
WITH weekly_averages AS (
    SELECT 
        DATE_TRUNC('week', "timestamp") AS week_start,
        AVG(exposure_score) AS avg_exposure_score
    FROM 
        exposure_scores
    GROUP BY 
        DATE_TRUNC('week', "timestamp")
),
current_previous_weeks AS (
    SELECT 
        current.week_start AS current_week,
        previous.avg_exposure_score AS previous_week_avg,
        current.avg_exposure_score AS current_week_avg
    FROM 
        weekly_averages AS current
    LEFT JOIN 
        weekly_averages AS previous 
    ON 
        current.week_start = current_previous_weeks.current_week + INTERVAL '1 week'
)
SELECT 
    current_week,
    CASE 
        WHEN NULLIF(previous_week_avg, 0) IS NOT NULL THEN 
            ((current_week_avg - previous_week_avg) / NULLIF(previous_week_avg, 0)) * 100
        ELSE 
            NULL 
    END AS percentage_change
FROM 
    current_previous_weeks
WHERE 
    previous_week_avg IS NOT NULL;
steps.description: The change in average exposure scores from one week to the next.

transformations.sql:
-- Metric: exposure_score_week_over_week_change: The change in average exposure scores from one week to the next.
INSERT INTO gold_exposure_score_week_over_week_change (week_start_date, percentage_change)
WITH weekly_averages AS (
    SELECT 
        DATE_TRUNC('week', "timestamp") AS week_start,
        AVG(exposure_score) AS avg_exposure_score
    FROM 
        exposure_scores
    GROUP BY 
        DATE_TRUNC('week', "timestamp")
),
current_previous_weeks AS (
    SELECT 
        current.week_start AS current_week,
        previous.avg_exposure_score AS previous_week_avg,
        current.avg_exposure_score AS current_week_avg
    FROM 
        weekly_averages AS current
    LEFT JOIN 
        weekly_averages AS previous 
    ON 
        current.week_start = current_previous_weeks.current_week + INTERVAL '1 week'
)
SELECT 
    current_week,
    CASE 
        WHEN NULLIF(previous_week_avg, 0) IS NOT NULL THEN 
            ((current_week_avg - previous_week_avg) / NULLIF(previous_week_avg, 0)) * 100
        ELSE 
            NULL 
    END AS percentage_change
FROM 
    current_previous_weeks
WHERE 
    previous_week_avg IS NOT NULL;

transformations.name: silver_to_gold_gold_significant_increase_assets

steps.sql_logic:
INSERT INTO gold_significant_increase_assets (asset_id, week_start, exposure_score_previous, exposure_score_current, percentage_increase)
WITH weekly_scores AS (
    SELECT 
        asset_id,
        DATE_TRUNC('week', score_date) AS week_start,
        AVG(exposure_score) AS avg_exposure_score
    FROM 
        exposure_scores
    GROUP BY 
        asset_id, DATE_TRUNC('week', score_date)
),
week_over_week AS (
    SELECT 
        current.asset_id,
        current.week_start,
        COALESCE(previous.avg_exposure_score, 0) AS exposure_score_previous,
        current.avg_exposure_score AS exposure_score_current,
        CASE 
            WHEN NULLIF(previous.avg_exposure_score, 0) IS NOT NULL THEN 
                (current.avg_exposure_score - previous.avg_exposure_score) / NULLIF(previous.avg_exposure_score, 0) * 100
            ELSE 
                NULL 
        END AS percentage_increase
    FROM 
        weekly_scores current
    LEFT JOIN 
        weekly_scores previous 
    ON 
        current.asset_id = previous.asset_id 
        AND current.week_start = previous.week_start + INTERVAL '1 week'
)
SELECT 
    asset_id,
    week_start,
    exposure_score_previous,
    exposure_score_current,
    percentage_increase
FROM 
    week_over_week
WHERE 
    percentage_increase > 10;
steps.description: List of assets that have shown a significant increase in exposure scores week-over-week.

        AVG(exposure_score) AS avg_exposure_score
    FROM 
        exposure_scores
    GROUP BY 
        asset_id, DATE_TRUNC('week', score_date)
),
week_over_week AS (
    SELECT 
        current.asset_id,
        current.week_start,
        COALESCE(previous.avg_exposure_score, 0) AS exposure_score_previous,
        current.avg_exposure_score AS exposure_score_current,
        CASE 
            WHEN NULLIF(previous.avg_exposure_score, 0) IS NOT NULL THEN 
                (current.avg_exposure_score - previous.avg_exposure_score) / NULLIF(previous.avg_exposure_score, 0) * 100
            ELSE 
                NULL 
        END AS percentage_increase
    FROM 
        weekly_scores current
    LEFT JOIN 
        weekly_scores previous 
    ON 
        current.asset_id = previous.asset_id 
        AND current.week_start = previous.week_start + INTERVAL '1 week'
)
SELECT 
    asset_id,
    week_start,
    exposure_score_previous,
    exposure_score_current,
    percentage_increase
FROM 
    week_over_week
WHERE 
    percentage_increase > 10;

steps.sql_logic:
INSERT INTO gold_quarterly_trend_breach_risk_likelihood (quarter, business_unit, average_breach_risk_likelihood)
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('quarter', br.timestamp) AS quarter,  -- Truncate timestamp to quarter
    br.business_unit,  -- Group by business unit
    AVG(COALESCE(br.breach_risk_likelihood, 0)) AS average_breach_risk_likelihood  -- Calculate average, handling NULLs
FROM 
    breach_risk_table br
GROUP BY 
    quarter, 
    br.business_unit  -- Group by quarter and business unit
ORDER BY 
    quarter, 
    br.business_unit;  -- Order results for better readability

transformations.name: silver_to_gold_gold_total_attack_surface

steps.sql_logic:
INSERT INTO gold_total_attack_surface (business_unit, total_attack_surface_elements)
SELECT 
    business_unit,
    COUNT(DISTINCT attack_surface_element) AS total_attack_surface_elements
FROM 
    attack_surface_table
WHERE 
    business_unit IS NOT NULL  -- Ensure business unit is not NULL
    AND is_active = TRUE        -- Only include active business units
GROUP BY 
    business_unit;

SELECT 
    business_unit,
    COUNT(DISTINCT attack_surface_element) AS total_attack_surface_elements
FROM 
    attack_surface_table
WHERE 
    business_unit IS NOT NULL  -- Ensure business unit is not NULL
    AND is_active = TRUE        -- Only include active business units
GROUP BY 
    business_unit;

transformations.name: silver_to_gold_gold_vulnerability_score

steps.sql_logic:
SELECT 
    as_table.business_unit,
    SUM(COALESCE(vs.score, 0)) AS total_vulnerability_score
FROM 
    attack_surface_table AS as_table
JOIN 
    gold_vulnerability_score AS vs ON as_table.id = vs.attack_surface_id
WHERE 
    vs.is_active = TRUE  -- Include only active vulnerabilities
    AND vs.assessment_date = (
        SELECT MAX(assessment_date) 
        FROM gold_vulnerability_score 
        WHERE attack_surface_id = as_table.id
    )  -- Ensure we are using the latest assessment
GROUP BY 
    as_table.business_unit
ORDER BY 
    as_table.business_unit;
steps.description: Sum of vulnerability scores associated with attack surface elements per business unit

transformations.sql:
-- Metric: vulnerability_score: Sum of vulnerability scores associated with attack surface elements per business unit
SELECT 
    as_table.business_unit,
    SUM(COALESCE(vs.score, 0)) AS total_vulnerability_score
FROM 
    attack_surface_table AS as_table
JOIN 
    gold_vulnerability_score AS vs ON as_table.id = vs.attack_surface_id
WHERE 
    vs.is_active = TRUE  -- Include only active vulnerabilities
    AND vs.assessment_date = (
        SELECT MAX(assessment_date) 
        FROM gold_vulnerability_score 
        WHERE attack_surface_id = as_table.id
    )  -- Ensure we are using the latest assessment
GROUP BY 
    as_table.business_unit
ORDER BY 
    as_table.business_unit;
transformations.description: Transform gold_vulnerability_score from silver to gold

transformations.name: silver_to_gold_gold_top_5_business_units_by_attack_surface

steps.sql_logic:
WITH ranked_business_units AS (
    SELECT 
        business_unit,
        COUNT(*) AS total_attack_surface,
        MAX(vulnerability_score) AS highest_vulnerability_score
    FROM 
        attack_surface_table
    GROUP BY 
        business_unit
    HAVING 
        COUNT(*) > 0  -- Only include business units with at least one attack surface element
),
ranked_with_ranks AS (
    SELECT 
        business_unit,
        total_attack_surface,
        highest_vulnerability_score,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_attack_surface DESC, highest_vulnerability_score DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        ranked_business_units
)
SELECT 
    business_unit,
    total_attack_surface,
    highest_vulnerability_score
FROM 
    ranked_with_ranks
WHERE 
    rank <= 5  -- Select top 5 business units
ORDER BY 
    rank;  -- Order by rank for final output

-- Insert the results into the target table
INSERT INTO gold_top_5_business_units_by_attack_surface (business_unit, total_attack_surface, highest_vulnerability_score)
SELECT 
    business_unit,
    total_attack_surface,
    highest_vulnerability_score
FROM 
    ranked_with_ranks
WHERE 
    rank <= 5;  -- Ensure only top 5 are inserted
steps.description: Ranking of the top 5 business units based on total attack surface count

transformations.sql:
-- Metric: top_5_business_units_by_attack_surface: Ranking of the top 5 business units based on total attack surface count
WITH ranked_business_units AS (
    SELECT 
        business_unit,
        COUNT(*) AS total_attack_surface,
        MAX(vulnerability_score) AS highest_vulnerability_score
    FROM 
        attack_surface_table
    GROUP BY 
        business_unit
    HAVING 
        COUNT(*) > 0  -- Only include business units with at least one attack surface element
),
ranked_with_ranks AS (
    SELECT 
        business_unit,
        total_attack_surface,
        highest_vulnerability_score,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_attack_surface DESC, highest_vulnerability_score DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        ranked_business_units
)
SELECT 
    business_unit,
    total_attack_surface,
    highest_vulnerability_score
FROM 
    ranked_with_ranks
WHERE 
    rank <= 5  -- Select top 5 business units
ORDER BY 
    rank;  -- Order by rank for final output

-- Insert the results into the target table
INSERT INTO gold_top_5_business_units_by_attack_surface (business_unit, total_attack_surface, highest_vulnerability_score)
SELECT 
    business_unit,
    total_attack_surface,
    highest_vulnerability_score
FROM 
    ranked_with_ranks
WHERE 
    rank <= 5;  -- Ensure only top 5 are inserted
transformations.description: Transform gold_top_5_business_units_by_attack_surface from silver to gold

steps.sql_logic:
INSERT INTO gold_attack_surface_count (os_software_stack, business_unit, environment, total_attack_surfaces)
SELECT 
    COALESCE(os_software_stack, 'Unknown') AS os_software_stack,  -- Handle NULL values for os_software_stack
    COALESCE(business_unit, 'Unknown') AS business_unit,        -- Handle NULL values for business_unit
    COALESCE(environment, 'Unknown') AS environment,            -- Handle NULL values for environment
    COUNT(*) AS total_attack_surfaces                            -- Count of all attack surfaces
FROM 
    attack_surface_table
GROUP BY 
    os_software_stack, 
    business_unit, 
    environment;

transformations.name: silver_to_gold_gold_likelihood_trend

steps.sql_logic:
INSERT INTO gold_likelihood_trend (month, average_likelihood_score)
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', likelihood_date) AS month,
    AVG(COALESCE(likelihood_score, 0)) AS average_likelihood_score
FROM 
    likelihood_table
WHERE 
    likelihood_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '12 months'
GROUP BY 
    month
ORDER BY 
    month;
steps.description: Measures the trend of likelihood scores over the past 12 months.

GROUP BY 
    month

transformations.name: silver_to_gold_gold_breach_risk_trend

steps.sql_logic:
INSERT INTO gold_breach_risk_trend (month, average_breach_risk_score)
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', br.timestamp) AS month,  -- Truncate timestamp to month
    AVG(COALESCE(br.breach_risk_score, 0)) AS average_breach_risk_score  -- Calculate average, handling NULLs
FROM 
    breach_risk_table br
WHERE 
    br.timestamp >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '12 months'  -- Filter for the last 12 months
GROUP BY 
    month  -- Group by the truncated month
ORDER BY 
    month;  -- Order by month for consistency
steps.description: Measures the trend of breach risk scores over the past 12 months.

transformations.name: silver_to_gold_gold_exposure_score_trend

steps.sql_logic:
INSERT INTO gold_exposure_score_trend (month, average_score)
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', es."timestamp") AS month,  -- Truncate timestamp to month
    AVG(COALESCE(es.score, 0)) AS average_score    -- Calculate average score, handling NULLs
FROM 
    exposure_scores es
WHERE 
    es."timestamp" >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '12 months'  -- Filter for the last 12 months
GROUP BY 
    month
ORDER BY 
    month;  -- Order results by month for trend analysis
steps.description: Trend of exposure scores over time

FROM

WHERE 
    es."timestamp" >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '12 months'  -- Filter for the last 12 months
GROUP BY 
    month
ORDER BY 
    month;  -- Order results by month for trend analysis
